review_title: Transformation of Sales Processes
description: Comidor's low-code platform significantly improved our company's sales workflows. This transformation has unlocked new levels of efficiency, making processes smoother and more streamlined. The automation of several critical processes such as lead generation, lead management, campaign tracking, and deal processing has likely reduced manual workload and increased accuracy and speed in handling these tasks. After receiving training from the Comidor team, we found it very easy to build new applications independently. (no coding experience at all) This indicates that the platform is user-friendly and that the training provided is effective in empowering business users to utilize the platform's capabilities.
author: Richa G.
pros: Comidor's low-code platform helped our company to transform the sales workflows and unlock new levels of efficiency. Some of the first processes we automate for our company are the lead generation, lead management, campaign tracking, and deal processing. We have built some new applications on ourselves after the training we went through with the Comidor team, and I can say it is super easy.
cons: While Comidor integrates with many third-party applications, we found it difficult at the beginning to configure the integrations with our internal systems. With the support of the Comidor's team, we managed to accomplish that on our own.

review_title: When it comes to scalability, Comidor is the best platform
description: For more than a year i have been using Comidor now and I'm so impressed with its super easy-to-use application development environment. We are delighted to have Comidor as a part of our team! It enables our business to grow with scalability and meets all of our needs. Incredibly easy to use, allowing us to modify and optimize our business applications, this low-code platform has everything you need to scale up your business - and I highly recommend it!
author: Timothy K.
pros: Using drag and drop in a visual environment makes modifying applications incredibly convenient and flexible! It is an incredibly powerful tool that offers limitless potential. The implementation process was incredibly smooth and easy, exceeding our expectations. It was a breeze to set up and all of our requirements were met without any issues. The customer service at this company is amazing. Whenever I need help, they are always super prompt and effective in finding me a solution. I'm truly impressed by their level of service excellence!
cons: I am totally impressed by Comidor and all the services they offer. It's hard for me to think of anything I don't like about Comidor at all!

review_title: Expense management solution: simple and user-friendly environment
description: Our administrative tasks have become much easier as a result of Comidor, which has enabled us to keep track of expenditures and fees for telecommunication services for all government agencies. Its user-friendly interface enables quick access and grouping of information. If you are looking for a way to manage your expenses and your relationships with service providers and vendors more efficiently, I would highly recommend Comidor.
author: Vasileios P.
pros: Using Comidor enables us to keep track of expenses and fees for telecommunication services. We can easily print approved payments and display pending service statements in different graphs with just a few clicks. Also, the customer service is always friendly and helpful. It was a great decision to choose Comidor for our payment processing needs
cons: Comidor has exceeded my expectations, and I am very pleased with it.

review_title: Great experience with Comidor
description: Overall, my experience with Comidor has been highly satisfactory, with the platform delivering on its promises of efficiency, customization, and empowerment. It has been an invaluable tool in optimizing our internal processes, enhancing the customer communication, and driving business growth.
author: Kyla S.
pros: Comidor is an excellent choice for businesses seeking a comprehensive digital modernization platform that combines innovation, automation, and empowerment to drive success and growth.
cons: Nothing special, everything is functioning well!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Scalable and Versatile CRM System
author: Aryan J.
pros: I like the Comidor CRM system because it’s easy to use and has powerful features that improve customer interactions and experiences. It can be customized to fit our needs, and their excellent support team is always ready to help. Plus, it keeps evolving to meet all our requirements.
cons: After using Comidor for less than a year, my team and I are thrilled with our improved performance and productivity. We have no complaints so far and hope to remain just as satisfied in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Manage vehicle technical inspections in one easy place!
description: Comidor has completely transformed the way our vehicle technical inspection center operates! This innovative platform has made everything much easier and smoother. The automated task management, the development of vehicle certification applications custom to our needs, online appointment scheduling, accounts and contacts management, and CRM capabilities help us manage our workflow better and give improved customer experiences. With the analytics and reporting tools, we can ensure that everything runs accurately with maximum efficiency!
author: Dimitris P.
pros: We are thrilled to have Comidor as our go-to solution for our technical inspection business. It makes customer data management, performance tracking, online appointment bookings, availability management so easy. Plus, the Car Master application is truly a revolutionary application! Our vehicle testing services have been greatly simplified and automated. We can now offer on-demand tests, with an automated certificate issued right after the test is complete.
cons: Comidor is all you need to use when it comes to collaborative tasks and CRM and has lots of customization options. Although understanding the interface can be a bit daunting at first, you'll get the hang of it in no time and make the most out of this amazing tool.

review_title: Planning, executing and managing marketing campaigns
description: Comidor is more than just a task management tool – it's a centralized hub for all our marketing data. We can access all the information related tou our marketing campaigns and processes and run them in the same place. The entire team is informed anytime about the process stage and performance and can keep the daily workload under control. Mnaagers access real-time dashboards with only the necessary information, without the need to search for the right data to make decisions and have a holistic business overview.
author: Nirali J.
pros: Comidor's powerful workflow capabilities allow us to effortlessly plan, organize, and execute our marketing campaigns with precision. Easily-created customizable workflows guide our team through every step, ensuring nothing falls behind. Also, Comidor's task management features help my team keep our marketing initiatives on track, with real-time updates and collaborative workspaces that foster productivity.
cons: The platform is very user friendly. However, the user interface could be enhanced by incorporating more modern elements.

review_title: Improved customer satisfaction thanks to Comidor custom CRM solution
description: Comidor CRM solution makes it convenient to access and manage customer data, monitor sales activities, send automated texts to notify customers about their vehicle inspection and personalize the customer experience. Furthermore, Comidor CRM solution helps us gain a better insight into what our customers want in order to create personalized marketing campaigns that attract more conversions and leads.
author: Eleni A.
pros: What I find particularly impressive about Comidor CRM is its user-friendly interface, numerous powerful features and customizability. Moreover, the customer service team is highly reliable and available for assistance which makes it easier for users. Last but not least, Comidor never stops innovating and refining their product based on the needs of users.
cons: Comidor comes with a great range of features that assist us with lead and customer relationship management. After becoming accustomed to the platform, that took us a while, we were able to capitalize on the different tools available to create highly successful customer relationships.

review_title: Redefining sales processes
description: By implementing a low-code application, the whole sales process is automated and orchestrated, making it more efficient and accurate. Among Comidor's features that helped our business and resulted in significant time savings were automatic calculations with Excel-like fields, integration with internal systems, and automated contract creation based on input data.
author: Carlos P.
pros: With Comidor RPA, we are able to automate previously manual processes, thereby saving us a lot of time. As a result of automated calculations, contract generation, dynamic Excel components, and real-time collaboration, our team is able to complete their tasks in significantly less time - a remarkable 50% reduction.
cons: Comidor's team assisted us with the coding required to use the Excel components for automatic calculations. We couldn’t do that by ourselves since we don’t have coding skills.

review_title: Comidor's Team is as Strong as its Functionality
author: Brett F.
pros: When a company invests in software, it is easy to get caught up in the product features, integrations, and technical capabilities. That stuff is important, but I've found that investing in the team behind the software product is equally important. Too often I've invested in a software, only to experience a lack of innovation, or subpar customer support in the subsequent months. With Comidor, not only is a company able to check all the boxes with product features and functionalities, but you're also able to check the box of a well-run company.
cons: I'm not sure I'd have any cons to offer.

review_title: Mi experiencia de uso de Comidor
description: Comidor es una plataforma muy rica en funcionalidad, sobre todo al combinar elementos de BPM y RPA. Permite desarrollar aplicaciones de manera sencilla y gestionar una organización/empresa por procesos, obtener estadísticas de desempeño de realización de tareas, etc., y trabajar prácticamente por excepción, gracias a las notificaciones y correos, que al usarse dentro de los procesos alertan a los usuarios a realizar una tarea asignada y/o pendiente.
author: Marco C.
pros: Combina funcionalidades de BPM y RPA Posee una serie de pasos muy claros a seguir para desarrollar una aplicación Es una solución que bien pueden utilizar usuarios de negocio ("Citizen Developers") Es muy fácil la creación de dashboards e incorporación de elementos gráficos, o de ingreso de datos, etc., en los mismos Cuenta con una manera muy sencilla de crear y asignar roles de seguridad a los usuarios, y de utilizarlos en las aplicaciones que se desarrollan Cuenta con una serie de aplicativos integrados que enriquecen la plataforma
cons: Me gustaría que la plataforma incluya reglas/funciones predeterminadas para validar campos y que los usuarios podamos desarrollar e incluir otras en el catálogo Todo lo que compone una aplicación no está en menú integrado (, además, si un conjunto de pequeñas aplicaciones conforman una más grande, no hay manera simple de integrarlas en un menú que facilite ver cuales son todas las aplicaciones y procesos que la componen) La integración de ambientes de dev, test y prod requiere una herramienta separada
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The power of low-code workflow automation
description: Thanks to Comidor, we streamline our workflows and complete supply requests faster! We manage, automate and track our supply requests, improve business units collaboration (regardless the geographical areas located), and create automatic assignments to different departments due to the platform's workflow automation capabilities. My team receives notifications and emails in real time, and managers complete tasks via email or via the platform. Using Comidor has allowed us to increase efficiency, productivity, and visibility into all our supply requests.
author: Evangelos F.
pros: Automating our workflow processes has enabled us to save considerable amount of time and resources. We have an efficient system for automated task assignment, with automated notifications and emails sent to the relevant personnel. We can completely manage our workflow and obtain clear visibility of our supply orders.
cons: Initially, I wasn't too keen on Comidor as there were an vast number of features available that we didn't require. This made the platform quite overwhelming when I first saw it. However, anyone can easily find what they are searching for eventually.

review_title: Un aliado estratégico para el éxito en Latino América
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Sin lugar a dudas, es la solución más flexible, fácil de usar & aprender, amigable con el usuario que he visto en el mercado en mucho tiempo. La combinación de un espacio de trabajo colaborativo inteligente, con la gestión orientada a procesos mediante BPM y la suma de capacidades de robotización de tareas, integración con otros sistemas, así como también inteligencia artificial hacen que la decisión de optar por una solución y un socio estratégico sea sin dudas Comidor. A ello se le suma la calidad y la excelencia de su apoyo comercial en la región, que para nosotros ha sido clave a la hora de definir en quien confiaremos lo más preciado que tenemos, nuestros clientes.
cons: Una excelente adición, como todo producto en evolución, sería añadir capacidades de DMN.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Satisfaction
description: In the period of covid Comidor helped our servises a lot.
author: Ourania G.
pros: The possibility of collaboration from everywhere.
cons: The menu is complex when you come to first contact.

review_title: The best value-for-money low-code automation platform on the market
description: Comidor offers an exceptional low-code application development experience that frees up my team and lets us focus on more critical duties without sacrificing valuable time to deal with extensive excel files and manual data input. Every piece of information my team searches for is instantly accessed in the application environment. It’s easy for me to make changes to the app based on our changing needs and requirements.
author: Jamie K.
pros: Exactly what we needed to build with low-code business applications to automate repetitive tasks and deliver real-time data to employees. One of the things I like most about Comidor is the ease of creating applications through the visual environment.
cons: I can't think of any issue or feature that Comidor lacks. The platform adapts to changing market needs by constantly enhancing its capabilities and adding new features.

review_title: Designing and deployment without writing a single line of code
description: Comidor is an incredibly useful platform for us to optimise our internal processes, bridge customer communication and increase productivity. By using Comidor, we can easily reduce and replace manual tasks, control costs and maximize efficiency. Drag-and-drop features provide us with an easy to use and quick way to customise applications and workflows without coding, thus reducing manual effort.
author: Neel S.
pros: With Comidor I can create applications quickly that fit my team's needs. The intuitive, low-code interface allows me to develop complex applications without sacrificing much time, effort, and resources. Comidor makes it convenient to modify the workflow as per any requirements without any coding knowledge, which is a great advantage. Nevertheless, caution should be taken while changing the existing flow of tasks.
cons: While I have nothing but good experiences with Comidor, it's still important to be mindful and open to improvement opportunities.

review_title: Comidor is all you need
description: Excellent experience all round - hard to fault
author: Andy K.
pros: The range of functionality combined with the power of the platform makes Comidor stand out. BPM, RPA and AI together with an intuitive App Builder means we can automate processes at lightning speeds and meet the complex demands of all our business users. The eco-system of functionality such as People Management, PM and CRM means Comidor is what we call our 'no limits' platform.
cons: The platform has a vast range of functionality and so can be dauting to learn it all - and it gets enhanced and updated constantly - a good problem to have I guess

review_title: Comidor is a Powerful Business Process Management Solution
description: Comidor is a robust and comprehensive solution that has brought our teams closer, increased our productivity, and enhanced our overall operational efficiency. If you're looking for a versatile and user-friendly platform to streamline your business processes, I highly recommend giving Comidor a try.
author: Alonso E.
pros: I've had the pleasure of using Comidor for our business, and it has truly been a game-changer. This platform has become an important part of our daily operations, specifically for its seamless workflow automation. We can design and automate everything from simple approval workflows to complex task assignments. This has not only saved us time but also reduced the chances of errors. The platform offers a range of collaboration tools, including chat, file sharing, and discussion boards that have helped to keep our teams connected, fostering a collaborative environment, even when working remotely.
cons: For new users, Comidor's interface may seem a little overwhelming at times. Simplifying the user experience and offering more intuitive navigation would enhance the platform's accessibility. With this said, the learning curve could be somewhat steep for new users. Maybe having more extensive onboarding resources and tutorials could help users make the most of the platform from day one.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Comidor Review
description: Positive!
author: Thrasyvoulos M.
pros: The culture of process management brought to us with the use of Comidor helps everyday business. That was an organisational big step for us.
cons: The mobile application provided. It is not up to the market standards. No standard integration with other tools.

review_title: Experience with Comidor
author: Frederic S.
pros: The software cover all needs we search since years and correspond to our company philisophy: we are human business designer and comidor is a unique tool with a unique support team in the backround. The the agile tool with an immense potential every day growing, covering the spirit of the leader team.
cons: it is not cons, but we would so catch up the time we lose with other tools

review_title: Excellent choice to help streamline and automate accounting processes
description: I've just started using Comidor for automating and orchestrating the accounting processes I carry out for business clients. It's been a great experience so far! I'm so impressed with how Comidor has made my accounting processes easier and quicker. Registering a company with the government and tax authority, as well as increasing share capital process, are incredibly straightforward and efficient. My team is always on top of their tasks with the automated workflow engine assigning them to each individual's calendar. With this, everyone gets a clear overview of every case quickly and efficiently.
author: Dimitris V.
pros: Comidor is an incredible tool for streamlining all my accounting processes - from registering contacts to creating accounts for clients, and managing all our accounting procedures. It serves as a one-stop-shop with everything I need to effortlessly operate and run the business on a daily basis! Additionally, automating our workflow gives us an incredible edge in terms of efficiency. We can streamline our communication with clients and free up valuable resources to work on more valuable activities.
cons: At first, I was unsure about Comidor and its ability to seamlessly transition me from my old way of working. However, when I got to know more about the platform and what it can do, I was completely impressed by how feature-driven it is!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My experience with Comidor
author: Susan K.
pros: The integration of multiple functionalities like project management, workflow automation, and CRM in one platform is highly beneficial.
cons: While Comidor is robust, the user interface can be quite complex for new users, which may require a steeper learning curve to fully utilize all its features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SIM Ordering Automation
description: Comidor has transformed my company's order management process! It has cut down the time taken to manage orders, coordinate with internal and external teams, and track orders throughout the entireprocess. Working with Comidor's order management end-to-end solution, I'm able to quickly view andmodify the status of each order. I would happily recommend it for anyone needing a great order management experience.
author: Raj M.
pros: Comidor takes the hassle out of tracking SLAs with real-time notifications and email triggering. We benefitgreatly from it as we are now able to stay on top of all our orders, keep them organized and automatedwithout compromising visibility throughout any process.
cons: The features and user experience of Comidor are brilliant but the interface could do with a modern touch.Nonetheless, Comidor is still an incredibly powerful tool with plenty of amazing benefits!

review_title: Comidor at Region of Crete
description: Comidor is a great Collaboration Platform. We were searching that kind of software for a long time! We are testing the product since July 2016 and using it productively since October 2016. Full Featured for out needs, adding more features with the help of Comidor Team. Great response time, perfect collaboration with all the personel and developers! Cost-effective, indeed!
author: Marina G.
pros: Full Featured, Complete.
cons: No time to use all features!

review_title: Excellent tool that really solves a major problem
description: + It solves business process modelling issues by centralising all the processes + It improves communications internally + Comes with added modules like Project management, HRM, CRM and more. Very happy with the solution
author: Deepak K.
pros: Its an excellent business process modelling tool. We were struggling with our company processes and have been doing a lot of work on papers. Thanks to Comidor team, who understood our requirements and provided a solution, which we had never thought of. This solved many problems like: - Business process which we can review online on cloud - Our team is connected to same tool, so communication has improved - Comes with Project management, HR and CRM modules, which really helped us in comparison to other overly expensive CRM tools. We are very happy with the services and support given by Comidor.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
